title: Squarespace Order
description: Represents an order placed on a Squarespace merchant site, including line items, customer information, shipping and billing addresses, fulfillment records, and financial totals.

id.description: Unique identifier for the order assigned by Squarespace

orderNumber.description: Sequential human-readable order number displayed to the customer

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the order was created

modifiedOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the order was last modified

channel.description: Sales channel through which the order was placed, such as SQUARESPACE or an external channel name

testmode.description: Indicates whether this order was placed in test mode and does not represent a real transaction

customerEmail.description: Email address of the customer who placed the order

billingAddress.description: Billing address provided by the customer at checkout

shippingAddress.description: Shipping address to which physical items will be delivered

fulfillmentStatus.description: Current fulfillment status of the entire order

lineItems.description: List of individual products and quantities included in the order

fulfillments.description: List of fulfillment records indicating shipped portions of the order

totals.description: Monetary totals for the order including subtotal, tax, shipping, and grand total

refundedTotal.description: Total amount refunded for this order

priceTaxInterpretation.description: Whether product prices are tax-inclusive or tax-exclusive

formSubmission.description: Custom form fields submitted by the customer with the order

externalOrderReference.description: Reference identifier from an external sales channel if the order was imported

Address.description: A postal address used for billing or shipping

firstName.description: First name of the address recipient

lastName.description: Last name of the address recipient

address2.description: Secondary address line such as apartment, suite, or unit number

postalCode.description: Postal or ZIP code for the address

phone.description: Phone number associated with this address

LineItem.description: A single product line included in an order

id.description: Unique identifier for this line item within the order

variantId.description: Unique identifier of the product variant ordered

sku.description: Stock keeping unit identifier for the product variant

productId.description: Unique identifier of the parent product

productName.description: Display name of the product at the time the order was placed

quantity.description: Number of units of this product included in the order

unitPricePaid.description: Price paid per unit at the time of purchase

lineItemType.description: The product type for this line item

customizations.description: Customer-supplied customizations applied to this line item

imageUrl.description: URL of the product image captured at time of purchase

Fulfillment.description: A record indicating that one or more line items have been shipped

shipDate.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the shipment was dispatched

carrierName.description: Name of the shipping carrier handling the shipment

service.description: Name of the shipping service level used

trackingNumber.description: Carrier-assigned tracking number for the shipment

trackingUrl.description: URL to the carrier's tracking page for this shipment

subtotal.description: Sum of all line item prices before discounts, shipping, and tax

shippingTotal.description: Total shipping charges for the order

taxTotal.description: Total tax charges applied to the order

discountTotal.description: Total discount amount applied via discount codes or promotions

grandTotal.description: Final total amount charged to the customer

giftCardRedemptionTotal.description: Total amount paid using gift card redemptions

Money.description: A monetary value paired with its currency denomination

value.description: Decimal string representation of the monetary amount

FormField.description: A custom form field submitted with an order

label.description: Display label of the form field as configured in Squarespace

value.description: Value entered or selected by the customer for this field

Customization.description: A product customization option applied to a line item

label.description: Display label for the customization option
